column1: Hey Spencer, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
That's the date of the spring break
Aight bet, you part of Noah's group?
Yes can I have a sign up link with the same group so I can get referrals
Can you set me up with that?
yea I'll send the link over bro
just sent that over should be hittin your inbox any second now
So are those links count me as the rep if someone signs up through them ?
I can get you set up as a leader. are y'all all workin together or you each separately have your own squads?
How much is the Black Friday discount take off?
the price in the email and the link is the black friday deal
We are in the same frat, so same group but I'm hitting some of the younger kids. So kind of different squads but still wanna be in the same place.
got you. how many people do you feel you'd get on your own?
I'm down to get y'all all hooked up but if its primarily the same frat and same group its better to have you all on the same reservation
Ok I feel you . I think I can get at least 15. The reason I want my own link is so I can get those referrals. I wanna make it as easy as possible though.
Word I feel you. Is it the same ppl that Noah would be getting? If you want to let me know who your ppl are directly I can keep tally for you
Spenc whats good brodie. how we lookin over there
I'm debating it because I don't wanna go around Noah's back
And the tally thing will be confiding
We can all work together bro, its all good
I'll get you all hooked up. Noah was first to hmu so he'll be the lead but you can still be a rep too and earn some perks for getting ppl tapped in
Ok bet, all the perks I want is the free room. I know I can get 15 signs in my name too
Feel you bro. how soon do you feel you'd get the 15? are you all in the same group text? or how are y'all reaching out to the guys
yerr checkin in bro, how we lookin?
yoyoo. how things lookin for the sqaud
whats good Spencer, any word on what the group wants to do?
I don't really like the idea of not having my own link.
I mean we can make you your own link bro, but are you all basically the same group as Noah?
Like if it's a completely diff set of ppl, then making another link is easy
But if it's the same guys and rooms will be getting mixed up then it won't make the most sense
Like if one person on your link wants to room with someone on Noah's link. Then things get all messed up
But if it's completely separate, and you'll have your own rooms, we can rock
That's straight, as long as we in same hotel
Yea everything will be the same. Want me to set it up?
Can we have an option for both of them
Yea just needa know how many slots to start with for each one. its an actual reservation with actual room slots
word and then needa know what room arrangement. all rooms of 4?
Word, the ppl you have were they ready to book today?
just emailed you your specific reservations
Thanks man I'll send it out now
Do you know what other schools are going there at the same time ?
Will send a list in a few
UHart, Ohio State, James Madison, URI, Purdue
and a bunch more bro. just looked at the recent 5
whats good bro whats everyones status
When's the deadline to sign up ?
Technically the deadline is passed bro
Ive been doing what I can to keep this open for y'all
I spoke to another frat and sorority from your school yesterday and was able to get them til the 23rd
I can do the same for you. the sign up + $200 deposited is needed to secure each persons spot
So for a 4 night, 4 person room. Is it 566 in total at sign up if they sign up before the 23rd. Or is it 766 total at sign up?
$200 at sign up goes towards the $566
so $366 remaining balance, due Jan 6. I'll update your reservations
$200 due by Dec 23, balance due by Jan 6
That's the latest the deadline can be, the 23rd?
Yea man we'll need to get something active by then. atleast your main group. once a reservation is actually active its easier for me to make things shake and add ppl as we go
but we gotta get some people in motion by the 23rd otherwise they gonna make me close it down. been pullin hella strings for all of you
Liked “but we gotta get some people in motion by the 23rd otherwise they gonna make me close it down. been pullin hella strings for all of you”
Correct me if I'm wrong For 4 day check in is, 3/16-3/20
Ok just wanted to confirm because the email said 3/14
Is there a booze cruise included as well?
Gotcha, think the other guys lmk most ppl want to do the 16th so I changed all of yours
we can do whichever you want to do tho bro
booze cruise isnt included in the base anymore. that was a deal from a way while back
checkin in fam anything you need help with to get your group rollin?
Trying to get everyone to sign on, it's harder bc it's last minute but I'm working on it.
Word bro lmk what you need
How do they sign up for a double room ?
Do they just enter a 4 person and leave the 2 extra spots empty ?
Yessir, just lmk who those ppl are and we'll adjust their rooms
If 2 people get a double does that count as 4 for me ?
So if 2 people opt in to pay more for a double room. Would that count as 4 people since they are paying more
would it count towards the 15 I need to get a free room
Yea I get you. nah it's per person
Damn it should lowkei be by how many rooms the ambassador books. Say I got 4-5 single rooms booked, that's the same as me getting 15 people in 4-5, four person rooms. You know
Yea not really bro. A 2 person room is a diff price than the 4 person room. Two diff types of room. Those people aren't paying double
It's just a diff arrangement. Once you have a set of two that want the two person, I'll show you what it looks like
On the main reservation page it shows the breakdown of pricing
Loved “It's just a diff arrangement. Once you have a set of two that want the two person, I'll show you what it looks like”
For example the 4 night, the 2 person room arrangement is $710 per person vs the $556 for 4 person
Liked “For example the 4 night, the 2 person room arrangement is $710 per person vs the $556 for 4 person”
Hey any chance you can add more rooms to the 4 person link ?
Maybe just switch the 5 persons to the 4 person if possible
yea bro I got you. everyone gonna do the 4 night?
how many more rooms you need for rn? theres 3 empty ones ready as of now
word yea I got you. 10 more rooms or 10 more slots?
I guess when you put it that way, 4 more rooms, should be good for now.
Worst case if more people need rooms between today and tmr could I hit you up for more ?
yea fam just shoot me a text just like this and I'll add
Liked “yea fam just shoot me a text just like this and I'll add”
If I fill more then the 14 rooms what kind of benefits could I receive ?
With your group size, once everyones in motion, we'll get your deposit payment reimbursed and comp your stay
so youll stay for free type beat
once everyone is in motion and gets their final payment in
Liked “once everyone is in motion and gets their final payment in”
Can they skip the deposit and just pay the full on the 28th, or is deposit required on the 23rd?
the deposit secures them in and hold their spot for the final balance. without it the spots get wiped
was there someone who specifically needed to make a payment arrangement?
yea so the final balance isnt due til Jan 6. ppl can pay in full anytime before then
but the deposit we def gotta get in for tomorrow if they 100% tryna go. the remaining balance, they got time to get in
Liked “but the deposit we def gotta get in for tomorrow if they 100% tryna go. the remaining balance, they got time to get in”
If I get more then the 15 needed for the free room, what other benefits can I get ?
What does temporary reserve mean compared to reserved ?
Temporary reserve typically means the person is in the process of creating their account still, or hasn't completed all of their account info
If I get more then 15 people what's the deal is there another tangible benefit I'll receive ?
How any ppl do you think you'll have past 15? Will custom create something for you
Probably at least 5 more then 15 but potentially up to 10 or more
I'll have a better idea by the middle of the day
Is there a time that's the deadline for it, is it 12:00 tonight ?
and at 25 I can hook you up with a free event ticket. can be either the booze cruise or one of the off resort nightclub nights
Can I get a flight credit instead or a full room to myself ?
full room we'd def need more to pull off. flight credit I'll find out about if you'd prefer that instead
Ok thanks. Can you add 4 more rooms
When is the remaining balance due after the deposit is paid tonight?
If people were to want to signup can they just sign up for a premium after today ?
*if they want to sign after the due date tonight
You said before if we had motion going we could potentially extend the deadline, is that a possibility?
Yea all depends on whats available for inventory. when we wanna add peeps I'll have to pull new rooms at the new rates at the time of adding them in
the current deadline is the deadline for the exact set up you have right now. same price, etc
anything we add after this theres no guarantee it'll be the same price
yessir. youre crushing rn tho bro. will def get a good incentive package for you
Wish there was a way to extend it so many ppl want to sign but aren't ready to make the decision
Yea so whoever makes the late decision, just lmk when they do and we'll work on getting them added in. will try to keep it all the same rate as the rest of the group but no guarantees
as long as there's availability we can make it shake
How can I remove a name from there spot?
Or do I tell you what name ?
Are they bailing or did they just want to move slots
Do you think that we'll get another week of leeway to sign up?
Got you. and yea as long as I have rooms avail to pull and add ppl we're good
And can you switch nick quinn, room 3 to room 8
but the heads that are in rn def gotta make their deposits
Loved “Got you. and yea as long as I have rooms avail to pull and add ppl we're good”
My bad I meant to say nick Quinn to a blank room
My dog whats good. more than half the people on your reservation havent paid and will be cleared by ops soon. whats the word with them
Can you remove Raymond Tarantano from room 8
He's no able to pay he's gonna try to leave and rejoin
What trouble is he having, doesn't need to leave and rejoin we can just fix it
He says it doesn't let him pay and says temp reserved
did he finish making his account?
tell him to log in here he must not be logged in https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/sign-in
yo bro ops hit me up about your res specifically. most of y'all are about to get cancelled
tryna hold things up for you. whats the word with everyone
also need you to deposit as well if you plan on going
yoo i'm gonna have to cancel everyone whos not deposited brotha, ops in on my back about the rooms
If it's not too late these ppl want to sign up
lemme see what I can do. all those people are out?
yoo just a heads up, everyone not paid is getting removed from operations tomorrow am, if they still plan on going they gotta hop in asap
Can the Aiden Goldberg kid get an extension he payed deposit just needs to pay the rest
yea when does he need til? theres a couple others too that are in the same boat
yoo there's still a few guys not caught up, any word on them?
yoyo whats the word fam is the whole group bailing on the trip?
whats good brotha. had a few ppl in the group cancel recently. also some spots expired with inactivity, including yours. did the overall group fade
yoo Spence whats good bro, did most of the group end up fading the trip
also are you no longer sliding through?
Yo I got like a grip of 6 if it's not too late to sign
Damn bro. thought you was out out
let me make sure we're good to get y'all back in. everyone ready to pay the full amount today?
4 ppl total in a room right ?
if you have 6 we'll have to do two rooms of 3
yoo lmk if you want to run that or not so I can put the request in
yoyo, did you wanna hop back in?
Yo spiffy can you give me a call?
Are you running discounts on the hotel ?
Can I buy one for cheap ?
nah unfort everything is still regular price right now
for Grand O. trips are still operating as normal
Gotta be someone trynna baxk out of there spot
yea everyone who has a spot is confirmed and locked in with the hotel. whether they decide not to go, or cancel, their spot is still confirmed so it doesnt open up a discounted spot for a new person
if you want to make a reservation lmk and I got you. its $566 for the 4 night
each for 4 ppl in a room
